## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, reporting, and marketing alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New reporting dashboard V1 presented, showing improved site health score (82 to 87) and positive LLM referral trends](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Proposed new meeting cadence with focused weekly topics: analytics, conversion analysis, and topic ideation](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Plans to align content strategy more closely with paid advertising efforts and competitive messaging](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [GrowthX team invited to join Flosum's Monday strategy meetings with ad agency for better integration](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)

## Topics

### New Reporting Dashboard

  - [V1 of new dashboard presented, including cohort analysis of traffic by content cluster](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic showing positive trends, broken down by different LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Site health score improved from 82 to 87 after cleaning up \~1000 404 errors](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### Website Structure and URL Organization

  - [Discussion on aligning URLs with product categories for better segmentation and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Potential to use blog categories (e.g., /blog/data) to cluster content, though considerations needed for URL structure changes](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### AI/LLM Tracking Tools

  - [GrowthX using Scrunch to track Flosum's presence across 78 prompts in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Ahrefs AI tool add-on discussed as a cost-effective option ($500-$700/month) compared to other solutions](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)

### New Meeting Cadence Proposal

  - [Week 1: Analytics deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Week 2: Conversion analysis with paid team input](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [Week 3: Topic ideation and product updates](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [Week 4 (if applicable): Async general updates](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

### Marketing Alignment

  - [Plans to create specific competitive messaging for each competitor](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Interest in aligning content strategy with paid advertising efforts](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [GrowthX team invited to join Flosum's Monday strategy meetings with ad agency (Outshine)](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)

### Content Updates

  - [9 articles pending review and publication](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=2124.0)
  - [No new topics added this week, awaiting deeper strategy discussion next week](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement new meeting cadence starting next week, beginning with strategy alignment discussion](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1863.0)
  - [GrowthX team to join Flosum's Monday strategy meetings with ad agency](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Matt to review and publish pending articles if possible](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=2147.0)
  - [Beau to share Google sheet with raw paid search and social lead data](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [Schedule deeper dive into marketing alignment and content strategy for next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/VmoaBm7b71YeWyzysFkBG_P9VFgXW7c-?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
